mapper.select: SELECT user_max_lend, book_max_lend, lend_max_term, max_extention, ext_lend_term, max_reserve, book_max_reserve FROM ELIB_CONFIG_LEND WHERE config_idx = 1
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO ELIB_CONFIG_LEND a USING dual ON (a.config_idx = 1) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET user_max_lend = #{user_max_lend}, book_max_lend = #{book_max_lend}, lend_max_term = #{lend_max_term}, max_extention = #{max_extention}, ext_lend_term = #{ext_lend_term}, max_reserve = #{max_reserve}, book_max_reserve = #{book_max_reserve}, mod_id = #{mod_id}, mod_date = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( config_idx, user_max_lend, book_max_lend, lend_max_term, max_extention, ext_lend_term, max_reserve, book_max_reserve, mod_id, mod_date ) VALUES ( 1, #{user_max_lend}, #{book_max_lend}, #{lend_max_term}, #{max_extention}, #{ext_lend_term}, #{max_reserve}, #{book_max_reserve}, #{mod_id}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT value FROM ELIB_CONFIG WHERE name = #{name}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO ELIB_CONFIG a USING dual ON (a.name = #{name}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET value = #{value}, mod_id = #{mod_id}, mod_date = SYSDATE, mod_ip = #{mod_ip} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( name, value, mod_id, mod_date, mod_ip ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{value}, #{mod_id}, SYSDATE, #{mod_ip} )
